rdf_content.description: This model is a UNet trained with the Noise2Void algorithm to denoise images. The training data consists of laser scanning confocal microscopy images of actin in bovine pulmonary artery endothelial cells. The notebook used to train this model is available on the CAREamics documentation website at the following link: https://careamics.github.io/0.1/applications/Noise2Void/Hagen/.
